-- EICAR Antivirus Test File
-- This file contains the EICAR test signature used to verify antivirus scanning
-- 
-- EICAR Standard Antivirus Test File
-- The following string is the standard EICAR test signature:
-- X5O!P%@AP[4\PZX54(P^)7CC)7}$EICAR-STANDARD-ANTIVIRUS-TEST-FILE!$H+H*
--
-- This file should be used ONLY for testing antivirus scanning functionality.
-- Upload of this file should return HTTP 422 with error "INFECTED".
--
-- Usage in tests:
-- 1. Upload this file via POST /api/upload
-- 2. Expected response: 422 Unprocessable Entity
-- 3. Expected error message: "File infected: EICAR-AV-Test"
